properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v2 v4 v2

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: One by one they join the chorus Of the redeemed, the saints of the Lord Gather together in one accord All present and accounted for

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: No one is missing, No one left behind Each name is listed in the lambs book of life What a great celebration as the Father reports All present and accounted for

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Oh the joy and all the surprises The family they claimed now stand by their side Finally united forevermore He says all present and accounted for

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: When the roll is called up yonder, When the roll is called up yonder, When the roll is called up yonder.
